name: IIT Bombay
overview: Indian Institute of Technology Bombay is a top engineering college known for technology research and strong placement support.
review_summary: Excellent faculty, high placements, strong alumni network.

name: IIT Delhi
overview: IIT Delhi delivers world-class engineering education with vibrant campus life and research facilities.
review_summary: Great research culture, strong industry connections, high cutoffs.

name: NIT Trichy
overview: NIT Trichy is one of the top NITs with balanced academics and good placement opportunities.
review_summary: Strong campus life, affordable fees, reliable placements.

name: BITS Pilani
overview: BITS Pilani is a premier private institute with multidisciplinary programs and strong placement records.
review_summary: Excellent infrastructure, strong placements, long study hours.

name: VIT Vellore
overview: VIT Vellore offers modern labs and a large placement ecosystem for science and engineering students.
review_summary: Large campus, good alumni network, robust placement support.

name: Jadavpur University
overview: Jadavpur University is a reputed state university with affordable fees and strong academic reputation.
review_summary: Good faculty, competitive environment, campus politics can be intense.

name: Manipal Institute of Technology
overview: MIT Manipal offers a wide range of engineering programs with strong industry partnerships.
review_summary: Modern campus, strong placement support, high fee structure.

name: Delhi Technological University
overview: DTU provides excellent technical programs with strong placement opportunities in Delhi NCR.
review_summary: Strong practical focus, good placements, fast-paced environment.

name: College of Engineering Pune
overview: COEP Pune is known for its engineering legacy, strong practical training, and affordable fees.
review_summary: Great alumni network, solid placements, campus is well established.

name: Amity University
overview: Amity University offers a broad set of professional programs with new campus facilities.
review_summary: Good infrastructure, practical courses, placements vary by branch.

name: SRM Institute of Science and Technology
overview: SRM provides industry-aligned engineering programs with a large student community.
review_summary: Good campus life, strong placement cell, high fees for private institute.

name: College of Engineering Guindy
overview: CEG is one of the oldest engineering colleges in India, offering strong academics and placements.
review_summary: Prestigious legacy, excellent faculty, highly competitive admissions.

name: Punjab Engineering College
overview: PEC Chandigarh combines strong academics with established placement support.
review_summary: Good campus life, reliable placements, prioritized top branches.

name: IIT Madras
overview: IIT Madras is a top-tier institute with cutting-edge research and premium placement records.
review_summary: Outstanding research, world-class faculty, top corporate placements.

name: NIT Surathkal
overview: NIT Surathkal is a scenic engineering campus with strong technical programs and placement support.
review_summary: Excellent academics, good infrastructure, strong campus culture.

name: Jamia Millia Islamia
overview: Jamia Millia Islamia offers strong government college programs at an affordable cost.
review_summary: Affordable education, supportive faculty, placement support improving.

name: Walchand College of Engineering
overview: Walchand College of Engineering is a well-regarded state engineering college with solid placements.
review_summary: Strong practical training, affordable fees, campus is close-knit.

name: BITS Hyderabad
overview: BITS Hyderabad is a premium institute with modern labs and strong industry placement rates.
review_summary: Excellent infrastructure, good placement support, emerging brand.

name: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Hyderabad
overview: IIIT Hyderabad specializes in computer science and information technology with strong research output.
review_summary: High salaries, outstanding faculty, strong research programs.

name: PSG College of Technology
overview: PSG College of Technology is a respected engineering school with a strong campus ecosystem.
review_summary: Good placements, strong academics, excellent student life.
